collectMarkdownCoverageNotesIn: Collect markdown coverage notes in one library, compare versions inside each ticker and watch the earnings calendar from the same screen.
coverageArchiveCouldNotBe: Coverage archive could not be loaded from the server. Refresh once the connection is back.
coverageVersionsWithinTheSame: Coverage versions within the same ticker.
filterByTickerCompanyOr: Filter by ticker, company or signal.
ifThereAreNoReports: If there are no reports here, an admin must upload markdown from the Coverage panel inside `/app/admin`.
noReportExistsForThis: No report exists for this ticker. Use the Coverage archive inside the admin panel to add a new report.
theCoverageArchiveIsNot: The coverage archive is not editable from this surface. New reports and versions are published only through the Coverage panel inside `/app/admin`.
thereIsOnlyOneVersion: There is only one version for this ticker right now.
theSelectedVersionIsCompared: The selected version is compared against the previous report.
translationPendingBody: The selected language version is not available for this coverage note yet. The source version is shown instead.
